query_name: 検証_ビンゴ施策_シミュレーション
query_string:
with target_customers as (
  select
    distinct
    id as customer_id
    , created as register_date
  from
    _l1_mysql_pos.customers
  where
    substr(created, 1, 10) >= '2024-08-10'
    and substr(created, 1, 10) <= '2025-08-10'
)

, app_log as (
  select
     customer_id
     , min(access_date) as first_login_date
  from
    z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
  group by
    1
)

, reservations as (
  select
    t0.customer_id
    , t0.order_id
    , t0.business_date
    , td_time_string(t1.event_unixtime, 'd!', 'jst') as reserve_date
    , max(if(t1.reservation_id is not null, 1, 0)) as appreserve_flag
    , max(if(t2.rate in (1,2), 1, 0)) as review_flag
    , max(if(nomination_fee > 0.0, 1, 0)) as nomination_flag
    , max(if(regexp_like(product_name, '足つぼ') and cast(regexp_extract(product_name, '([0-9]+)') as integer) >= 30, 1, 0)) as foot_flag
    , max(if(product_name in ('マットレス', 'Cool プレミアムマットレス'), 1, 0)) as premiummatt_flag
    , max(if(t0.business_hour in (12,13,14,15,16,17,18) and holiday_type is null and business_dow not in ('土', '日'), 1, 0)) as daytime_flag
    , max(if(treatment_minutes >= 90, 1, 0)) as over90m_flag
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail as t0
  left join
    _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_reserve as t1
    on t0.reservation_id = t1.reservation_id
  left join
    _l1_mysql_hp.reviews as t2
    on t0.order_id = t2.order_id
  left join
    _integration_datamart.mst_datetime as t3
    on t0.business_date = t3.business_date
  group by
    1,2,3,4
)

, order_seq as (
  select
    *
    , min(business_date) over (partition by customer_id) as f1_business_date
    , lead(business_date, 1) over (partition by customer_id order by business_date) as f2_business_date
    , row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by business_date) as order_sequence
  from 
    reservations
)

, merged as (
  select
    customer_id
    , register_date
    , first_login_date
    , order_id
    , business_date
    , reserve_date
    , appreserve_flag
    , review_flag
    , nomination_flag
    , foot_flag
    , premiummatt_flag
    , daytime_flag
    , over90m_flag
    , f1_business_date
    , f2_business_date
    , if(date_diff('day', cast(register_date as timestamp), cast(first_login_date as timestamp)) between 0 and 90, 1, 0) as within90d_login_flag
    , if(date_diff('day', cast(register_date as timestamp), cast(reserve_date as timestamp)) between 0 and 90, 1, 0) as within90d_reserve_flag
    , if(date_diff('day', cast(register_date as timestamp), cast(business_date as timestamp)) between 0 and 90, 1, 0) as within90d_order_flag
    , if(date_diff('day', cast(register_date as timestamp), cast(f2_business_date as timestamp)) between 0 and 90, 1, 0) as within90d_f2_flag
  from
    target_customers
  left join
    order_seq using (customer_id)
  left join
    app_log using (customer_id)
  where
    order_sequence = 1
)

, agg_bingo as (
  select
    customer_id
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and premiummatt_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b1__premiummatt
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and review_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b2__review
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and foot_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b3__foot
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and nomination_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b4__nomination
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_f2_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b5__nomination
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b6__app_reserve
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and daytime_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b7__daytime
    , 1 as b8__login
    , max(if(appreserve_flag = 1 and within90d_order_flag = 1 and over90m_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as b9__over90m
  from
    merged
  group by
    1
)

, simulation as (
  select
    customer_id
    /* 横ライン */
    , if(b1__premiummatt + b2__review + b3__foot = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_1_2_3
    , if(b4__nomination + b5__nomination + b6__app_reserve = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_4_5_6
    , if(b7__daytime + b8__login + b9__over90m = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_7_8_9
    /* 縦ライン */
    , if(b1__premiummatt + b4__nomination + b7__daytime = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_1_4_7
    , if(b2__review + b5__nomination + b8__login = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_2_5_8
    , if(b3__foot + b6__app_reserve + b9__over90m = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_3_6_9
    /* 斜ライン */
    , if(b1__premiummatt + b5__nomination + b8__login = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_1_5_8
    , if(b3__foot + b5__nomination + b7__daytime = 3, 1, 0) as bingo_3_5_7
  from
    agg_bingo
)

, tmp as (
select
  customer_id
  , bingo_1_2_3 + bingo_4_5_6 + bingo_7_8_9 + bingo_1_4_7 + bingo_2_5_8 + bingo_3_6_9 + bingo_1_5_8 + bingo_3_5_7 as bingo_count
from simulation
)

select
  count(distinct if(bingo_count >= 1, customer_id)) as "1ライン以上達成者"
  , count(distinct if(bingo_count >= 3, customer_id)) as "3ライン以上達成者"
  , count(distinct if(bingo_count = 9, customer_id)) as "全ライン達成者"
from tmp
